title: syringa lilac
intro: Syringa lilac, also known as the lilac tree, is a flowering shrub or small tree belonging to the family Oleaceae, native to East Asia and Southern Europe. The medicinal properties of Syringa lilac include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Syringa lilac include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as asthma. Herbal preparations of Syringa lilac can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
